raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AB 1831 will criminalize the creation, distribution, and possession of artificial intelligence-generated Child Sexual Abuse Material (CSAM).",
    "Artificial intelligence technologies can produce disturbing and harmful content resembling actual children.",
    "The images generated by AI can be virtually indistinguishable from a real child.",
    "Existing laws do not address computer-generated images that depict the likeness of a child.",
    "AB 1831 would prohibit the creation and possession of obscene CSAM images generated by artificial intelligence.",
    "Research has shown a correlation between the consumption of CSAM and an increased risk of individuals engaging in hands-on sexual offenses against minors.",
    "Viewing and possessing CSAM material can contribute to desensitization and may escalate criminal behavior.",
    "Machine-learning models were trained on datasets containing thousands of depictions of known CSAM victims."
  ]
}
```
